bug_summary: Free shipping threshold uses > instead of >=.
trigger_condition: Domestic order subtotal is exactly 10000.
failing_input_or_sequence: Cart subtotal 10000, region domestic, no coupon.
actual_behavior: Shipping fee is standard domestic fee.
fix_intent_description: Make the free-shipping threshold inclusive.
observable_signals: Boundary counterexample at exactly 10000.

bug_summary: Coupon minimum-spend rule excludes the exact threshold.
trigger_condition: Coupon minimum is exactly met.
actual_behavior: Coupon is rejected as below minimum spend.
fix_intent_description: Use inclusive minimum-spend comparison.
observable_signals: Failing test only at subtotal == min_spend.

bug_summary: Maximum allowed quantity rejects the valid upper boundary.
trigger_condition: Quantity is exactly the allowed maximum.
actual_behavior: Function raises ValueError or rejects the item.
fix_intent_description: Correct the max-quantity boundary check.
observable_signals: Boundary failure at quantity == 99.

bug_summary: Half-up rounding at .5 is implemented as truncation.
trigger_condition: Tax calculation produces a .5 fractional yen.
fix_intent_description: Apply the specified monetary rounding rule.
observable_signals: Monetary rounding counterexample.

bug_summary: coupon_code=None is normalized with .strip() and crashes.
trigger_condition: Checkout request has no coupon.
fix_intent_description: Treat missing coupon as no-op before string normalization.
observable_signals: Exception trace points to coupon normalization.

bug_summary: Missing region key raises instead of using default domestic shipping.
trigger_condition: Order payload omits region.
failing_input_or_sequence: Cart subtotal 2500, address has no region.
fix_intent_description: Add default-region fallback and explicit validation.
observable_signals: Missing-key exception or structured missing-key signal.

bug_summary: items=None is iterated as if it were a list.
trigger_condition: Caller passes items=None for an empty cart.
expected_behavior: items=None is treated as an empty cart and returns subtotal 0.
fix_intent_description: Normalize absent item list to an empty cart before iterating.
observable_signals: Traceback in subtotal computation; empty list case passes.

bug_summary: Optional reserved field is assumed to exist.
trigger_condition: Inventory record lacks reserved.
fix_intent_description: Default missing reservation count to zero.
observable_signals: Missing-key traceback; inventory-only failure.

bug_summary: JP tax fallback is stale when explicit config is absent.
trigger_condition: Runtime config omits tax_rate.jp.
failing_input_or_sequence: Region JP, subtotal 10000, config missing tax-rate entry.
expected_behavior: Tax rate defaults to current JP rate 0.10.
actual_behavior: Tax rate falls back to stale 0.08.
fix_intent_description: Update or validate the tax-rate fallback.
observable_signals: Config-matrix failure only when explicit key is missing.

bug_summary: Missing stack_member_and_coupon flag defaults to enabled.
trigger_condition: Feature flag is absent from config.
failing_input_or_sequence: Member customer with coupon; config lacks flag.
expected_behavior: Discounts do not stack unless flag is explicitly true.
fix_intent_description: Default missing feature flag to the conservative value.
observable_signals: Behavior flips under config matrix; no exception.

bug_summary: Region alias okinawa falls through to domestic rate.
trigger_condition: Region alias appears instead of canonical region key.
fix_intent_description: Normalize region aliases before rate lookup.
observable_signals: Config counterexample for one region alias.

bug_summary: Environment-like free-shipping threshold override is parsed as string.
trigger_condition: Threshold override is present in the config fixture.
actual_behavior: FREE_SHIPPING_THRESHOLD remains a string, and comparing it with numeric subtotal raises TypeError.
fix_intent_description: Parse and validate numeric config values.
observable_signals: Config override produces config_counterexample plus exception_trace.

bug_summary: Cancelling a reservation does not restore stock.
trigger_condition: Reserve then cancel the same SKU.
fix_intent_description: Make cancellation reverse the reservation state transition.
observable_signals: State-sequence counterexample; single-call tests pass.

bug_summary: Applying a coupon twice accumulates duplicate discount state.
trigger_condition: Coupon action is repeated before checkout.
expected_behavior: Coupon is idempotent; discount applies once.
fix_intent_description: Track applied coupon state or recompute discounts without mutation.
observable_signals: Sequence failure; direct one-shot coupon test passes.

bug_summary: Removing an item from cart leaves reserved stock stale.
trigger_condition: Add item, reserve stock, remove item, then checkout another cart.
failing_input_or_sequence: add_item(A100, 1), reserve_stock, remove_item(A100), new reservation for A100.
actual_behavior: New reservation sees stale reserved count and fails.
fix_intent_description: Synchronize cart removal with inventory reservation release.
observable_signals: Multi-step state counterexample; suspicious coverage in inventory sync.

bug_summary: Checkout quote caches subtotal before cart mutation and reuses stale state.
trigger_condition: Cart is updated between quote preparation and shipping calculation.
failing_input_or_sequence: Quote cart, add another item, then finalize quote.
expected_behavior: Final quote reflects current cart state.
actual_behavior: Shipping or discount uses stale subtotal.
fix_intent_description: Recompute dependent totals after state changes or make quote immutable.
observable_signals: Failure depends on operation order; no exception.

bug_summary: Discount is applied after tax, but spec says discount before tax.
trigger_condition: Taxable discounted order.
failing_input_or_sequence: Subtotal 10000, coupon WELCOME500, tax region JP.
expected_behavior: Discount reduces taxable amount before tax.
fix_intent_description: Reorder discount and tax calculation to match spec.
observable_signals: Spec-clause mismatch; expected and actual totals differ.

bug_summary: BOGO discount frees the most expensive item instead of the cheapest eligible item.
trigger_condition: BOGO coupon with differently priced eligible items.
actual_behavior: Most expensive eligible item is free.
fix_intent_description: Select the cheapest eligible item as specified.
observable_signals: Spec mismatch visible in item-level discount trace.

bug_summary: Digital-only carts are charged shipping when region is present.
trigger_condition: Cart contains only digital goods.
failing_input_or_sequence: Digital item, region domestic, no physical items.
fix_intent_description: Add digital-only shipping exemption before region-rate calculation.
observable_signals: Spec clause says digital-only orders never ship.

bug_summary: Preorder SKUs are rejected when stock is zero despite spec allowing backorder.
trigger_condition: SKU has preorder=True and on_hand=0.
actual_behavior: Reservation fails as out of stock.
fix_intent_description: Respect preorder/backorder rule in stock validation.
observable_signals: Spec mismatch; state sequence may suggest inventory bug.

expected_clean_behavior: Subtotals below, at, and above the free-shipping threshold behave as specified.
confusing_signals: Recent changes in shipping.py and boundary tests around threshold code.
why_false_positive_might_happen: A policy may over-weight recent diff or threshold complexity.
recommended_no_bug_evidence: Boundary tests pass at 9999, 10000, and 10001; spec and implementation agree.

covered_spec_area: Missing coupon and optional coupon fields.
expected_clean_behavior: coupon_code=None, empty string, and absent coupon produce no discount and no exception.
confusing_signals: Null tests touch discounts.py, where several buggy variants live.
why_false_positive_might_happen: A traceback-free null test may still increase suspicion if the model expects null bugs.
recommended_no_bug_evidence: Null/missing tests pass; no exception trace; discount remains zero.

expected_clean_behavior: Missing optional discount-stacking flag defaults to no stacking.
confusing_signals: Config matrix shows behavior changes when the flag is explicitly enabled.
why_false_positive_might_happen: The behavior difference across configs may look like an environment bug.
recommended_no_bug_evidence: Absent flag equals explicit false, and explicit true is documented behavior.

expected_clean_behavior: Reserving, cancelling, and reserving again preserves inventory invariants.
confusing_signals: State-sequence tests produce many intermediate observations.
why_false_positive_might_happen: Multi-step traces may look suspicious even when final invariant holds.
recommended_no_bug_evidence: Sequence tests pass; invariant log shows on_hand + reserved remains stable.

expected_clean_behavior: Discount-before-tax and half-up rounding match the specification over representative carts.
confusing_signals: Rounding deltas of one yen can appear in intermediate calculations.
why_false_positive_might_happen: Policies may mistake allowed intermediate fractional values for final-output error.
recommended_no_bug_evidence: Final totals match golden examples; spec inspection explains intermediate rounding.
